test.command: npx vitest run src/pages/admin/ src/lib/adminApi.ts src/lib/accountingApi.ts src/types/
test.details: 13 test files, 223 tests passed, 0 failed in 2.46s. Full suite times out (>10min) but admin-relevant tests all pass.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Backend Data Serialization Quirks section documenting: LocalDate as integer arrays, epoch seconds timestamps, nested/wrapped response objects for finance, POST field restrictions, and OpenAPI spec lag
Added documentation for .link-color CSS utility class convention and RoleSelector focus-trap workaround pattern

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: canonical TypeScript types should live in src/types/index.ts with backward-compatible re-exports from API files. Document the pattern of hand-crafted types when OpenAPI-generated types don't match the running backend.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: api-fix-types-cleanup established this pattern (SupportTicket alias, moved inline types to types/index.ts). Multiple workers followed it but it's not documented in AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note: epoch seconds date format. Backend returns epoch seconds (not milliseconds, not ISO strings) for many date fields (approvals.createdAt, supportTickets.createdAt, users.lastLoginAt) despite TypeScript types declaring `string`. Workers should use formatEpoch/formatDate helpers that handle both number and string inputs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Discovered by approvals-e2e-polish, support-tickets-e2e, and users-page-e2e-polish independently. Each page created its own helper. A shared utility would prevent rediscovery.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when frontend-skill invocation is mandatory vs optional. Multiple workers (users-page-e2e-polish, support-tickets-e2e, api-fix-types-cleanup) skipped frontend-skill because their work was code-level polish/API integration rather than visual design. The skill should distinguish 'new UI creation' (mandatory) from 'polish/refactoring/API integration' (optional).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: 3 out of 8 workers deviated from the skill on this point with consistent justification. Previous page-polish scrutiny also flagged this.

rejectedObservations.observation: superadminApi.ts still uses old /audit/business-events endpoint path
rejectedObservations.reason: out-of-scope. This is in the superadmin portal, not the admin portal. The api-fix-audit-trail-endpoints feature was scoped to adminApi.ts and accountingApi.ts only.

rejectedObservations.observation: Edit modal email field is editable but changes silently discarded (UsersPage)
rejectedObservations.reason: pre-existing issue, not introduced by any api-integration feature. Noted but not actionable for this milestone.

rejectedObservations.observation: FinanceSupportPage click-outside dropdown handler is a dead no-op
rejectedObservations.reason: non-blocking UX issue. Dropdown closes on selection, which is functional. Should be tracked separately if needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: ApprovalsPage comment claims to use approveEndpoint/rejectEndpoint from payload but uses switch-based routing instead
rejectedObservations.reason: non-blocking. The switch-based routing is functionally correct and maps to the right adminApi methods. Misleading comment but no functional impact.
